summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.kernel; public class SessionBoundaryGuard { private static final ThreadLocal<String> currentSessionId = new ThreadLocal<>(); public static void enterSession(String sessionId) { currentSessionId.set(sessionId); } public static void exitSession() { currentSessionId.remove(); } public static String getCurrentSessionId() { return currentSessionId.get(); } public static boolean isInSession() { return currentSessionId.get() != null; } }
